description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped rock with a predominantly dark gray to black coloration and scattered lighter mineral inclusions. The surface is rugged and uneven, featuring a mix of coarse and fine textures, with some areas appearing slightly smoother due to natural weathering. The rock has a somewhat flattened profile on one side, while the opposite side is more convex and rounded. Small white and yellowish specks are visible throughout, suggesting the presence of quartz or feldspar minerals embedded in the darker matrix. The edges are jagged and angular, with no sharp points but several pronounced ridges and indentations. This rock would blend naturally into an urban park, roadside verge, or landscaped area, serving as a natural obstacle or decorative element.
description: A dark, rugged rock with scattered light mineral specks and a coarse, uneven surface. Its irregular shape and jagged edges make it a natural-looking urban barrier or landscape feature.
description_view_0: The rock appears broad and flat with a rough, dark surface and visible white mineral inclusions.
description_view_1: This side shows a narrow, curved profile, emphasizing the rock's thickness and rounded edge.
description_view_2: The back view reveals a more convex, bulbous surface with yellowish specks and a generally smoother texture.
description_view_3: A side view highlighting a prominent ridge and a large white mineral patch embedded in the dark matrix.
attribute_location: urban park or landscaped roadside verge
